Discussion
</s>
<s>
K
##ak
##imoto
and
Ak
##az
##awa
[
19
]
first
isolated
and
described
AD
##MA
from
human
urine
in
19
##70
.
</s>
<s>
Since
their
initial
obser
##vation
,
AD
##MA
has
be
##en
shown
to
represent
a
novel
risk
factor
for
the
development
of
endothelial
dys
##function
.
</s>
<s>
Oxidative
stress
has
be
##en
shown
to
increase
the
activity
of
arginine
-
methyl
##ating
and
AD
##MA
-
degrading
enzymes
,
